revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-2-370

Cylindrical or tapered plastic or fibre device inserted into drilled masonry, into which a screw may cut a corresponding thread, while expanding the plug to form a secure fixing.

{{IALAFooter}}
